P

Luca Hem

Person · First seen 3304-06-08 · 2 mentions
Active: 3304-06-08 → 3304-06-10
Mentions Timeline (2 articles)
3304-06-10
Week in Review
Weekly summary covering the murder of INRA descendant Luca Hem by the League of Reparation, Aisling Duval hosting Jordan Rochester and Caspian Leopold's subsequent visit, the Lave Radio Network vs Lave Jet Family rivalry, successful conclusions of two starport repair initiatives, and the theft of the Youscape artwork from Garden City Gallery.
3304-06-08
INRA Descendant Murdered
Luca Hem, great-grandson of INRA programme coordinator Amaro Hem, is murdered by the League of Reparation. Senior Agent Tanya Ramirez reveals Hem's body was found strapped into a salvaged Cobra Mk III that struck an asteroid in the Aeternitas A Belt, recreating the circumstances of Commander John Jameson's death. Hem's family and nine other related individuals are taken to secure locations. The staged murder is interpreted as poetic justice by the League.
